description: Resource schema for AWS::StepFunctions::MapRun. A Map Run is a set of child workflow executions started by a Distributed Map state in Step Functions.

MapRunArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the Map Run.
MapRunArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the Map Run.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2000  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ExecutionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the execution in which the Map Run was started.
ExecutionArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the execution in which the Map Run was started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.description: The current status of the Map Run.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the Map Run.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: RUNNING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED | ABORTED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartDate.description: The date when the Map Run was started.
StartDate.markdownDescription:
The date when the Map Run was started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StopDate.description: The date when the Map Run was stopped.
StopDate.markdownDescription:
The date when the Map Run was stopped.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MaxConcurrency.description: The maximum number of child workflow executions configured to run in parallel for the Map Run at the same time.
MaxConcurrency.markdownDescription:
The maximum number of child workflow executions configured to run in parallel for the Map Run at the same time.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ToleratedFailurePercentage.description: The maximum percentage of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.
ToleratedFailurePercentage.markdownDescription:
The maximum percentage of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ToleratedFailureCount.description: The maximum number of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.
ToleratedFailureCount.markdownDescription:
The maximum number of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MapRunItemCounts.description: Contains details about items processed in all child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

Pending.description: The total number of items to process in child workflow executions that haven't started running yet.
Pending.markdownDescription:
The total number of items to process in child workflow executions that haven't started running yet.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Running.description: The total number of items being processed in child workflow executions that are currently in-progress.
Running.markdownDescription:
The total number of items being processed in child workflow executions that are currently in-progress.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Succeeded.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have completed successfully.
Succeeded.markdownDescription:
The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have completed successfully.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Failed.markdownDescription:
The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have failed.

---

Update requires: No interruption

TimedOut.markdownDescription:
The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have timed out.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Aborted.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that were stopped.
Aborted.markdownDescription:
The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that were stopped.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Total.description: The total number of items processed in all the child workflow executions started by a Map Run.
Total.markdownDescription:
The total number of items processed in all the child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
